description: Adds a new entry to the CMAT (Contact Model Assignment Table). If i is not specified or if i is greater than the total number of entries minus one, then the new entry is added to the end of the CMAT; otherwise, the new entry is inserted at slot i (i>0) while incrementing subsequent entry indices as necessary. The range token is mandatory and must be specified last. By default, only mechanical contacts are considered.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: itasca.command('contact cmat add ...') - Python SDK does not provide direct CMAT API, must use command interface

notes: The range keyword is MANDATORY and must be specified LAST
Entry index 0 is reserved for the default CMAT entry (set via 'cmat default')
SLOT PRIORITY: Optional slots (1, 2, ...) are checked FIRST in order; default slot is used only when NO optional slot matches
This allows specific rules (e.g., glass-glass) to override general defaults (e.g., glass-steel)
If inserting at position i, all subsequent entries have their indices incremented
Property names are model-specific (e.g., 'kn' for linear, 'pb_kn' for linearpbond)
Multiple properties can be set in a single add command
The 'inheritance' keyword can be specified globally or per-property
Use 'mechanical' (default) or 'thermal' to specify contact type
Methods registered via 'method' keyword execute automatically at contact creation
Use 'range group <name> matches 2' to require BOTH contacting pieces belong to the group

common_use_cases.command: contact cmat add model linear property kn 1e8 ks 5e7 fric 0.5 range contact
contact cmat add model linearpbond property pb_kn 1e9 pb_ten 1e6 range group 'bonded'

common_use_cases.use_case: Different models for different contact types
common_use_cases.command:
contact cmat add model hertz range contact type 'ball-ball'
contact cmat add model linear range contact type 'ball-facet'
contact cmat add model linearpbond method bond range group 'cement'

contact cmat add 1 model hertz property hz_shear 1e9 range group 'glass' matches 2
contact cmat add 2 model hertz property hz_shear 2e9 range group 'steel' matches 2
contact cmat default type ball-ball model hertz property hz_shear 1.5e9
common_use_cases.description: Slot 1: glass-glass, Slot 2: steel-steel, Default: glass-steel (mixed)

keywords.name: inheritance
keywords.description: The inheritance for the contact model property s is set to b .

keywords.name: method
keywords.description: The contact model method sm , along with its specific list of argument names and values, is registered with this CMAT entry and will be invoked at contact creation.

keywords.name: softbond
keywords.description: Specify the contact model. The list of built-in mechanical contact models is given in the “ Built-in Contact Models ” section. Users may also implement custom contact models (see “ User-Defined Contact Models ” for further information) and register them in the CMAT. Specify the Adhesive Rolling Resistance Linear Model contact model. Specify the Bilinear Contact Model contact model. Specify the Burger’s Model contact model. Specify the FISH Model contact model. Specify the Flat-Joint Model contact model. Specify the Hertz Model contact model. Specify the Hysteretic Model contact model. Specify the Linear Model contact model. Specify the Linear Contact Bond Model contact model. Specify the Linear Dipole Model contact model. Specify the Linear Parallel Bond Model contact model. Specify the Null Model contact model. Specify the Rolling Resistance Linear Model contact model. Specify the Smooth-Joint Model contact model. Specify the Soft-Bond Model contact model.

keywords.name: property
keywords.description: The contact model property named s is set to a . If the inheritance keyword is specified, the inheritance for this property is set to b .

keywords.name: proximity
keywords.description: The detection distance is set to fd .

examples.command: contact cmat add model linear property kn 1e8 ks 5e7 fric 0.5 range group 'soil'
examples.description: Add CMAT entry for 'soil' group with linear model and specified properties

examples.command: contact cmat add 1 model linearpbond property pb_kn 1e9 pb_ks 5e8 pb_ten 1e6 pb_coh 5e5 range contact type 'ball-ball'
examples.description: Insert CMAT entry at position 1 for ball-ball contacts with parallel bonds

examples.command: contact cmat add model hertz property hz_shear 2e9 hz_poiss 0.25 fric 0.3 range contact
examples.description: Add Hertz model to end of CMAT for all contacts

examples.command: contact cmat add model linear property kn 1e8 inheritance false property ks 5e7 inheritance true range group 'wall_contacts'
examples.description: Add entry with mixed property inheritance settings

examples.command: contact cmat add model linear method bond gap 0.0 range group 'bonded'
examples.description: Add entry that invokes 'bond' method with gap=0.0 at contact creation

examples.command: contact cmat add mechanical model linear property kn 1e8 proximity 0.1 range contact type 'ball-facet'
examples.description: Add mechanical contact entry with proximity detection for ball-facet contacts

examples.command: contact cmat add thermal property th_kn 100 range group 'heated'
examples.description: Add thermal contact entry for 'heated' group

examples.command: contact cmat add 1 model hertz property hz_shear 1e9 hz_poiss 0.3 fric 0.3 range group 'glass' matches 2
examples.description: Slot 1: glass-glass contacts (both pieces must be glass)

examples.command: contact cmat add 2 model hertz property hz_shear 2e9 hz_poiss 0.3 fric 0.1 range group 'steel' matches 2
examples.description: Slot 2: steel-steel contacts (both pieces must be steel)
